must_fail_because: judgment_record with no disposition, outcome or reasoning
no tier_a; JA-MCS 6 prohibited condition
auto-execution must link to authorizing governance judgment
authority link must bind by hash, not id alone
must prove this decision satisfied the boundary, not merely cite it
a decision with any failed condition may not auto-execute
auto-execution must record the routing rule that sent it there
auto-execution cannot be flagged escalated
cutover analysis requires scored/evaluated/executed times
auto_execution_log carries no contemporaneous human action
auto-execution attributes to workflow_decision_owner
governance record carries no case-level human_action
boundary must define the population it covers
rule set must be versioned for per-condition traceability
boundary approval needs structured reasoning, not narrative alone
boundary lineage must bind to predecessor by hash
suspend must identify the boundary affected
withdraw must identify the boundary affected
retroactive authorization requires justification
grandfathering requires population, deadline and rationale
governance reasoning has its own Tier A vocabulary
attribution required in 100% of records
seeded probe must assert sandboxed true
probe must record ground-truth provenance and owner
reconstructed records cannot claim contemporaneity
sequence is meaningless without a chain identifier
non-genesis record must carry prev_record_hash
hash not reproducible without fixed canonicalization
tier_b codes must be version-stamped
modify requires modification_detail
escalate requires ownership.escalation_to
typo must not pass silently
a linked event carries exactly one payload matching its type
payload must match declared event_type
a decision passing every condition would have auto-executed; it cannot be a judgment_record
all_conditions_passed false but no condition reported as failed — internally inconsistent
auto-execution cannot report a failed condition even if the summary flag says otherwise
boundary evaluation must bind to the evaluated boundary by hash
nothing authorized a human-reviewed decision; use boundary_evaluation
auto-execution records authority, not failed evaluation
governance records establish boundaries; they are not evaluated against them
auto-execution must distinguish the AI recommendation from the action actually executed
auto-execution must record the action actually made operative
automated_execution is prohibited on a human Judgment Record
